hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
except:
    sys.exit(0)
content = str(data)
patterns = [
    r'(?i)(api[_-]?key|secret[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|auth[_-]?token|private[_-]?key)\s*=\s*[\"\'][a-zA-Z0-9/+]{20,}',
    r'sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{32,}',
    r'AIza[0-9A-Za-z\\-_]{35}',
    r'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}',
    r'ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}',
    r'xoxb-[0-9]{11}-[0-9]{11}-[a-zA-Z0-9]{24}'
]
for p in patterns:
    if re.search(p, content):
        print('SECURITY ALERT: Possible secret/API key detected in file. Do NOT commit this value. Move it to .env instead.')
        sys.exit(2)
"
